reviews.review_description: If you like bad quality games then this is your game. The quality is SO bad I don’t recommend.

if you're looking for a fun zombie shoting game with fun animated caricters ... DONT GET THIS GAME is anamtin is sloppy and it just suck's the only good thing this game is good at. Is taking up you space DONT GET IT !!!!!!!

Sorry to say it’s kind of a bad game to be fair. I think this is it. It is still in progress, but I hope it becomes better because there’s a thing where zombies can attack you very easily even when you’re far away from your fast and hard to shoot for somewhere and it’s kind of glitchy to the controls are hard. I mean you can try if you like it but no it’s fine. I guess it’s not the worst but it’s not the best. ￼￼
